overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a leather jacket walking through a rainy urban night scene. The character navigates wet city streets beneath a railway viaduct, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and graffiti-covered brick industrial buildings.

events.description: crossing the wet cobblestone street from the corner to the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character in leather jacket crossing the street and stepping onto the sidewalk, moving toward the railway bridge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding black umbrella standing near the corner

entered.detail: large metal truss railway bridge spanning across the street ahead
older brick railway arch with warm lighting visible through the tunnel
modern building with closed metal roll-up shutters
dark colored van parked at the curb
rain-slicked cobblestone road surface reflecting street lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy street corner beneath a large metal railway bridge. The player character crosses the wet cobblestone street, passing a parked van and pedestrians with umbrellas, heading toward the illuminated brick archway of the railway bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under railway viaduct with graffiti walls

events.description: passing a group of three pedestrians standing under umbrellas on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians under the railway bridge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall brick industrial building wall running alongside the sidewalk
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
leafless trees lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow sidewalk under the railway viaduct, the character passes by a brick wall covered in graffiti. The street is lined with parked cars and leafless trees, while other pedestrians with umbrellas walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under railway bridge with industrial buildings

events.description: entering darker shadow area directly beneath the railway bridge structure
passing building entrance with red ambient lighting illuminating the wall

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the bridge deck, passing through darker shadows near the red-lit building entrance

entered.detail: building entrance with warm red lighting glowing from within
set of concrete steps leading up to a building entrance
black garbage bags piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper under the railway bridge where the lighting becomes darker and more shadowed. Passing a building entrance with distinctive red lighting and concrete stairs, the environment feels more enclosed and industrial.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching intersection with illuminated advertisement

events.description: passing large illuminated advertisement poster on the brick wall

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection, passing the illuminated poster and preparing to cross

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street ahead at the intersection

entered.detail: large backlit advertisement poster mounted on the brick wall showing text and portrait
pedestrian crosswalk markings visible at the approaching intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the bridge, the character passes a brightly illuminated advertisement poster on the wall and approaches an intersection. The railway bridge recedes into the background as the scene opens up to the crosswalk and street corner ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy street corner through the shadowed depths of a railway viaduct and back out into the open city. It begins with the character crossing wet cobblestones past a parked van and pedestrians with umbrellas, moving toward the illuminated brick archway of a large metal bridge. As the camera follows the character along the narrow sidewalk, the scene shifts to a corridor of graffiti-covered brick walls, parked cars, and leafless trees. The environment then becomes more enclosed and industrial, dipping into darker shadows and passing a building entrance marked by distinctive red lighting and concrete stairs. Finally, the camera emerges from under the bridge past a brightly lit advertisement poster, as the railway structure recedes and the view opens up toward a distant intersection and crosswalk.
